headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Reports Q1: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
summary: Healthcare distributor and services company Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) will be reporting earnings this Thursday before market hours. Here’s what investors should know.

headline: GEHC Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Net Margin Declines
summary: GE HealthCare misses Q1 EPS but tops revenue estimates as Imaging, AVS and PDx growth offset PCS weakness; shares slide due to margin pressure.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Cardinal Health (CAH) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Cardinal Health, at around US$205 per share, still offers value or whether most of the opportunity has already been priced in. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with a 0.3% return over 7 days and a 0.5% decline over 30 days, while still showing a 48.7% return over 1 year and a 162.3% return over 3 years. Recent coverage of Cardinal Health has focused on its position within the healthcare supply chain and how investors are reacting to...
